title: Don Hammond
compiled_truth: Don Hammond is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-07 to 2002-06-19), Don Hammond sent 8 and received 117 emails, totalling 125 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dale Rasmussen](people/dale-rasmussen) (6), [Mary Hain](people/mary-hain) (5), [Ed Clark](people/ed-clark) (4), [Jody Blackburn](people/jody-blackburn) (4), [Jim Gilbert](people/jim-gilbert) (3).
